title: 20pc Universal Hobby Complete Aluminum Storage Container Set 1 Inch Diameter
description:
Keep small parts, crafts, or minerals organized with the Universal Hobby 20pc Aluminum Storage Container Set! The Universal Hobby 20pc Aluminum Storage Container Set is a great addition to any craft set or hobby station. Featuring 20 aluminum containers with clear glass lids, you'll be able to organize all of your small items. Each case measures 1 in diameter and uses a twist off lid so you can safely secure those small parts. Because the top is constructed of clear glass, you'll easily be able to tell your items apart without having to label the containers. The 20 cases come in a durable aluminum case, measuring 6.5 x 5.5 x 1. The case is slim and sleek, perfect for leaving on display or easy storage when not in use. This set makes a great gift for crafters and hobbyists alike!
